pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage with main booking form for immediate and flexible rides, including multi-stop trips and saved address shortcuts. Supports starting 'now' rides, multi-stop journeys, and pre-filling pickup from Saved Places.
primary_functions: Start an immediate taxi booking by entering pickup and drop-off locations using address autocomplete
Select pickup time including 'Now' or within the next few minutes for immediate rides
Add one or more intermediate stops to create a multi-stop trip
Set passenger count to ensure suitable vehicle options (e.g., 3 passengers)
Choose pickup location from saved places such as Home and Work
Submit the booking form to view available ride options for the chosen route and time

incoming_params.description: Optional SavedPlace ID used to prefill the pickup location from a saved address such as 'Work - 45 Oak Avenue'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the immediate booking form ('View ride options' button) after calling searchImmediateRides.
Click 'Schedule for later' toggle/link from the homepage booking form.

access_methods.description: Primary entry via 'Home' link in the main header navigation.
Can be loaded directly with optional pickupSavedPlaceId parameter for deep-linked bookings from Saved Places.

pages.name: Schedule Ride
pages.description: Dedicated booking form for rides scheduled in the future, such as airport trips or morning commutes. Used to set a specific date/time before viewing scheduled ride options.
primary_functions: Start a scheduled ride by entering pickup and drop-off locations with address autocomplete
Select a future pickup date using a calendar date picker
Set an exact pickup time (e.g., 08:30 AM) for the scheduled ride
Optionally choose passenger count for the scheduled trip
Submit details to view scheduled ride options and pricing for the selected time and route

incoming_params.description: Optional SavedPlace ID to prefill the pickup location when scheduling a ride from a saved address.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the scheduled ride form ('View ride options' button) after calling searchScheduledRides.
Click a 'Book for Now' or similar link to switch back to immediate booking.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Schedule Ride' link in the main header navigation.
Can be opened directly, optionally with pickupSavedPlaceId set from Saved Places.

pages.name: Ride Options
pages.description: Listing page showing all available vehicles and estimated fares for the chosen route, time, and passenger needs. Supports filtering by category/capacity/accessibility, applying promos, and sorting before selecting a ride.
primary_functions: Display a list of available ride options with vehicle type, estimated fare, ETA or pickup time, and rating
Filter ride options by vehicle category such as Economy, Standard, Sedan, Minivan/XL
Filter ride options by seating capacity, including options suitable for 3+ passengers
Apply accessibility filters such as wheelchair-accessible vehicles only
Enter and apply promo codes (e.g., OFFICE10) to update estimated fares
Sort ride options by criteria such as Price: Low to High or Rating: High to Low
Identify rides under a target budget by viewing updated fares after sorting and filtering
Select a specific ride option to proceed to the passenger details and confirmation page

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the ride search created by searchImmediateRides or searchScheduledRides, used to load the correct current ride options.
Indicates whether this is an 'immediate' or 'scheduled' search, used for labels and messaging in the ride list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific ride option card after calling chooseRideOption to create a booking draft.
Click 'Edit search' for an immediate ride to adjust pickup/drop-off on the Home page.
Click 'Edit search' for a scheduled ride to adjust date/time or locations.

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting the booking form and successfully creating a ride search.
Can be revisited directly using ride_options.html?rideSearchId=...&searchType=... while the ride search is still active.

pages.name: Ride Booking & Passenger Details
pages.description: Confirmation page where the user reviews trip details, enters passenger information, chooses payment, and confirms the booking. Supports both immediate and scheduled rides and card/cash/wallet payments.
primary_functions: Show a concise summary of the trip including pickup, drop-off, any added stops, scheduled time, vehicle type, and estimated fare
Display applied promotions or discounts and the final estimated total
Collect passenger information such as name and phone number
Allow the user to choose payment method (Cash, Card, Wallet) for the ride
For card payments, collect necessary card details to complete the booking
Confirm an immediate ride booking or schedule a future ride with a single action button (e.g., 'Confirm Booking' or 'Schedule Ride')

incoming_params.description: Booking draft identifier returned by chooseRideOption, used to load the trip summary before confirmation.
Optional ride search ID for back navigation and context, matching the ride options previously shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Successful confirmation of a booking via confirmCurrentBooking, when the user chooses to view full trip details.
Successful booking confirmation followed by choosing 'View all my trips'.

access_methods.description: Accessed after a ride option is selected and a booking draft is created.
Can be reloaded directly with bookingDraftId in the URL while the draft is still active.

pages.name: Saved Places
pages.description: Management page for saving and editing frequently used addresses such as Home and Work. Also allows starting a new booking from a saved address.
primary_functions: Add a new saved address by entering a label (e.g., Home, Work) and selecting an address via autocomplete
Edit existing saved places to update labels or addresses if they change
Delete saved places that are no longer needed
Ensure saved Home and Work addresses appear as quick-select options in pickup and drop-off fields on booking forms

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book from here' on a saved address to start an immediate booking from that location on the Home page.
Click 'Schedule from here' on a saved address to start a scheduled booking using that pickup location.

access_methods.description: Opened via 'Saved Places' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from booking forms (e.g., 'Manage saved places') when a user wants to add Home/Work.

pages.name: My Trips
pages.description: Overview page listing the user’s upcoming and past rides with quick access to details, modification, and cancellation actions.
primary_functions: View a list of upcoming rides, including airport trips and other scheduled bookings
View a list of past and completed rides in a separate 'Past' or similar tab
Sort or visually identify the soonest upcoming ride based on pickup time
Select a specific trip from the list to open its detailed view and management options

incoming_params.description: Determines which trip group to show: 'upcoming' (default) or 'past'. The header link uses tab=upcoming.
Optional Trip ID to visually highlight in the list after booking, modification, or cancellation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a trip row or card in the 'Upcoming' or 'Past' tab.
Click 'Get help with this trip' from a trip item.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'My Trips' header link pointing to trips.html?tab=upcoming.
Can be opened directly with tab and optional highlightTripId query parameters.

pages.name: Trip Details
pages.description: Detailed view for a single ride, used to review, modify, or cancel upcoming trips and to inspect past trip information, including fare breakdown and payment method.
primary_functions: Display full trip information including route, pickup time, vehicle class, fare, discounts, and payment method
Allow modification of upcoming rides, including changing the pickup time and upgrading or downgrading the vehicle class
Provide a 'Save Changes' action to apply modifications to an upcoming ride
Allow cancellation of upcoming rides, including choosing a cancellation reason from a list
Offer refund method options such as wallet credit versus other refund methods when cancelling a ride
Confirm cancellation and reflect the updated trip status after the action

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Trip to display, modify, or cancel.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to My Trips' or after successfully saving changes to an upcoming trip.
After successfully cancelling a trip and confirming refund options.
Click a 'Report an issue with this trip' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed whenever a tripId is provided in the URL, typically from My Trips or after booking.

pages.name: Help & Support
pages.description: Central hub for getting help, reporting issues with trips, and contacting support through messaging or in-app chat. Supports trip selection, issue type selection, ticket creation, and ongoing chat.
primary_functions: Browse and select a help topic such as Trip issues, Billing issues, or General questions
When reporting trip-related issues, choose a specific trip from a list of recent completed and upcoming rides
Select an issue type such as Billing issue or Fare problem, and then refine to options like Fare higher than expected
Enter a text description of the issue in a message box to provide details to support
Choose a preferred contact method, such as in-app chat or message support
Submit the issue or start a support chat session to contact the support team

incoming_params.description: Preselected support topic such as 'trip_issues' or 'billing_issues'. Footer 'Support' link uses topic=trip_issues.
Optional Trip ID to preselect when opening Help & Support about a specific ride.
Identifier of an existing support ticket whose conversation should be shown, used to display in-site chat history.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After creating a new support ticket via createSupportTicketForTrip, navigate to the ticket’s conversation view.
Click 'View trip details' from within the support flow for a selected trip.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Help & Support' link in the main header navigation.
Accessed via 'Support' footer link pointing to support.html?topic=trip_issues.
Can be loaded directly with topic, tripId, or ticketId to deep-link to specific help views.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information page describing the taxi service, coverage area, and company background, including general (non-support) contact details.
primary_functions: Provide background information about the taxi service and its mission
Describe service areas, operating hours, and general capabilities (e.g., wheelchair access, airport transfers)
Offer non-support contact details such as business email or phone for general inquiries

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact support' or 'Ask a question' link from the About page.

access_methods.description: Opened via 'About' link in the website footer.
May be linked from other informational content such as FAQ answers.

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about bookings, payments, cancellations, promotions, and wallet usage, with contextual links to functional pages.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about how to book immediate and scheduled rides
Explain how pricing, estimated fares, and promo codes work
Clarify cancellation rules, refunds, and wallet credit usage
Link users to other relevant pages such as My Trips or Help & Support for more detailed assistance

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View your trips' link from an FAQ answer with relatedLinks routeKey 'my_trips'.
Click a 'Contact support' link from an FAQ answer with relatedLinks routeKey 'help_support'.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'FAQ' link in the website footer.

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the taxi booking service, including booking, modification, and cancellation policies.
primary_functions: Present the full terms and conditions of using the taxi booking website and services
Detail user rights and responsibilities, including booking, modification, and cancellation policies
Clarify limitations of liability and dispute resolution processes

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reference link from the Terms page to the Privacy Policy.

access_methods.description: Opened via 'Terms & Conditions' link in the website footer.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Details on how user data and trip information are collected, used, and protected, including how to make data access requests.
primary_functions: Explain what personal and trip data the service collects and why
Describe how data is stored, secured, and shared with third parties if applicable
Inform users of their privacy rights and how to contact the service regarding data requests

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact us about your data' link which routes to Help & Support for privacy-related queries.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Privacy Policy' link in the website footer.

header_links.description: Homepage with main booking form for immediate and multi-stop rides
Booking form for rides scheduled in advance
List of upcoming and past rides, defaulting to upcoming trips
Manage saved addresses like Home and Work
Get help, report trip issues, and contact support

footer_links.description: Learn more about the taxi service and company
Frequently asked questions about bookings, payments, and policies
Help center focused on trip-related questions and issues
Legal terms governing use of the service
Information on how user data and privacy are handled
